# hindclaw_bank_profile (Data Source)

Reads a Hindsight bank profile.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bank_id` (String) Bank ID.

### Read-Only

- `background` (String) Background context.
- `disposition_empathy` (Number) Empathy (1-5).
- `disposition_literalism` (Number) Literalism (1-5).
- `disposition_skepticism` (Number) Skepticism (1-5).
- `mission` (String) Bank mission.
- `name` (String) Bank name.
